summary: Systems architecture review accepts the M5 playable-slice definition as a planning-only contract. The task remains in REVIEW, does not self-approve ACCEPTED/CLOSED, stays inside allowed project status/task/message state paths, and does not modify apps, packages, content-source, tools, .github, ADRs, gate docs, roadmap, acceptance matrix, manifest, checksum, validation, release, product-code, package-code, dependency, or formal historical content paths. The contract reuses accepted M1-M4 command/query surfaces, preserves single-writer authority, deterministic replay, explicit save/protocol boundaries, player/AI command parity, no hidden global penalties, no fixed culture/ethnicity buffs, no character total-score shortcut, no UI WorldState mutation, no hidden AI cheats, and no manual node battle leakage.

tests_run.result: Changed paths: PROJECT_STATUS.md; project/goal-mode-state.json; project/messages/outbox/GOAL-MODE-CONTINUATION.json; project/messages/outbox/M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001__MSG-20260626-M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-START__lead_orchestrator.json; project/messages/outbox/M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001__MSG-20260626-M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-WRITER-REVIEW__gameplay_designer.json; project/messages/routes/M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001__ROUTE-20260626-M5-SLICE-LEAD-TO-GAMEPLAY-START-CONFIRMED.json; project/messages/routes/M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001__ROUTE-20260626-M5-SLICE-WRITER-TO-SYSTEMS-REVIEW.json; project/model-routing-state.json; project/tasks/active/M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001.json; project/tasks/thread-registry.json.

M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001 is REVIEW; M5-TASK-GRAPH-001 is CLOSED; M5-SIM-PLAYABLE-LOOP-001, M5-CLIENT-PLAYABLE-UI-001, M5-MULTIYEAR-AI-RUN-001, M5-PERFORMANCE-GATE-001, M5-PLAYER-RESEARCH-001, M5-WEB-WINDOWS-DISTRIBUTABLE-001, M5-MANUAL-NODE-BATTLE-DECISION-001, and M5-EXIT-HUMAN-GATE-001 remain DRAFT.
No output while M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001 is in REVIEW and downstream tasks remain dependency-gated.

Contract lists 27 required command surfaces and 19 required read models; all are present in packages/protocol/src/index.ts or packages/sim-core/src/command-query-v1.ts; missingCommands=[]; missingQueries=[].

decisions: ACCEPT: Task state and routing are correct for review. project/tasks/active/M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001.json has status REVIEW and route_to systems_architect; thread state records gameplay_designer as review and systems_architect as in_review. No ACCEPTED/CLOSED self-approval is present.

ACCEPT: The real origin/main...HEAD diff is confined to allowed_paths: PROJECT_STATUS.md, project goal/model/thread state, active task JSON, and project/messages outbox/routes. It does not touch forbidden apps/packages/content-source/tools/.github/docs decisions/gate/roadmap/acceptance-matrix/manifest/release artifacts.

ACCEPT: The contract is planning-only. It explicitly declares COMPOSITE_FICTIONAL_PLACEHOLDER and excludes product code, package code, content-source data, production dependencies, roadmap edits, acceptance-matrix edits, ADRs, gate docs, release artifacts, formal historical content, telemetry, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mods, branding, commercial decisions, frozen architecture/platform/core decisions, and irreversible migrations.

ACCEPT: Required command and read-model surfaces are reuse of accepted M1-M4 protocol/sim-core surfaces rather than hidden protocol/save/architecture expansion. The only future implementation obligation is evidence against these surfaces; any new schema, save, protocol, or architecture change must be routed in its owning downstream task.

ACCEPT: Human Gates are preserved for M5 formal passage, manual node battle, frozen product/platform/core architecture changes, telemetry, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mods, release/commercial choices, branding, major cultural-risk decisions, irreversible migrations, and paid services/accounts/secrets.

ACCEPT: Design guardrails reject hidden global penalties, fixed culture/ethnicity obedience buffs, character aggregate-score shortcuts, UI/client authority over WorldState, AI hidden resource/knowledge cheats, and manual battle behavior inside this slice contract.

ACCEPT: The contract gives downstream tasks enough boundaries and evidence requirements: M5-SIM-PLAYABLE-LOOP-001 must prove deterministic authoritative replay; M5-CLIENT-PLAYABLE-UI-001 must expose goal/commands/previews/save-load/reason codes without client WorldState ownership; M5-MULTIYEAR-AI-RUN-001 must prove multiple years without rescue or command parity breach; M5-PERFORMANCE-GATE-001 must report concrete Web/Windows/Node/save-load/read-model measurements; M5-PLAYER-RESEARCH-001 must use manual/anonymized observations, not telemetry.
risks: Downstream implementation tasks must not treat this planning contract as approval to add new protocol, save, migration, content, UI, release, telemetry, server, account, paid-service, or dependency scope. If an accepted surface proves insufficient, that task needs explicit systems_architect review and, where applicable, ADR or Human Gate routing.

The contract intentionally keeps map scale, session duration, in-game duration, and comprehension rate as starting hypotheses. They remain unproven until the sim, client, AI, performance, and player-research tasks provide evidence.

The contract names a composite fictional placeholder only. Any move toward real names, identities, cultural symbols, language, art, music, event content, or historically grounded claims still requires historical_researcher routing before production.
requested_action: Run independent qa_reviewer review of this accepted systems_architect review and the writer contract. Do not mark M5 formal passage, manual node battle, downstream implementation tasks, or the task itself CLOSED until lead integration and required review gates complete.
